Metadata.Goal: 让 runtime event API 与 core-contract payload export 不再继续暴露 collective alias。

TaskSpace.name: refactor-aiagent-holon-remove-runtime-event-aliases
TaskSpace.Description: 移除 holon runtime event 与 core-contract 的 collective alias

TaskGroup.name: Track Freeze
TaskGroup.Description: 锁定 runtime event/core-contract alias removal 边界。

Task.name: 编写 proposal/spec/plan
Task.Description: 明确本轮只删除 collective event alias 与 Collective.ts contract alias。

TaskGroup.name: Alias Removal
TaskGroup.Description: 移除 runtime event 与 contract alias。

Task.name: 删除 AgentEventGraph collective event alias

TaskGroup.name: Tests And Closure
TaskGroup.Description: 同步 tests、报告与 strict validation。

Task.name: 更新 focused tests 与报告
Task.Description: 同步 agent_event_graph/layout tests 与 theater 报告中的当前剩余面。

Task.name: 执行 strict validation 与 focused regression
Task.Description: 运行相关 tests 与 `codument validate refactor-aiagent-holon-remove-runtime-event-aliases --strict`。
